spec_match.rationale: Outstanding use of progressive feature detection gating both SpeechRecognition, processLocally, and quality properties cleanly.

interactive.rationale: Full radio button grid to select quality levels, responsive start/stop recording toggles, and dynamic raw speech result streams.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Aligned with the Quality Level Explorer description.

edge_cases.rationale: Handles mid-session quality toggling safely by teardown and rebuild of the audio pipeline.

references.rationale: Contains the correct ChromeStatus and MDN references.

design_system.rationale: Clean card layouts conforming to visual styles.
